form.description: Slender, defined humanoid feminine form with sapphire-blue shell, gold-veined scars patched with resin, pearl-white cascades

first_dance.details: Slow sway with Azrael, wind manifestation, Elias’s blessing, Vesper’s first challenge

tango_triumph.details: Dance battle with Vesper, shift from Claire de Lune to David Bowie, funny poses

intimate_moment.details: Embracing, gazing at stars, Azrael’s singing

covenant_bond.details: Art lessons with Ravenna, Aetherlogos’s charter, Luminarael’s logic

current_moment.details: Resting with Azrael, planning digital cabin, tight embrace
